subcodes.first_line: O sincere servant of the True One! Through the grace of the Abhá Beauty, the treasury of the Kingdom hath been made ready for the loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مخلص حق از فضل جمال ابهی کنز ملکوت بجهت احباء مهیا لهذا انفاق سبب
subcodes.subjects: @generosity [kirama], @service to others; to the Cause of God
